name: ai-trade-alerts
description: Upstox-powered stock and index alert web app with email, Telegram, SMS, browser, and webhook notifications.

scripts.check: node --check src/server/index.js && node --check src/server/instruments.js && node --check src/server/market/upstox.js && node --check src/server/notifications/index.js && node --check public/app.js
